# Replaceme — AI Agent Manifest (llms.txt)
# Format: https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2026-07-08

> Replaceme is a direct-hire Filipino remote talent marketplace that connects global employers with top-tier Filipino professionals — without agency fees, salary commissions, or middlemen.

## What is Replaceme?

Replaceme is a subscription-based SaaS platform launched to solve the inefficiency of traditional overseas recruitment agencies. Employers pay a flat monthly fee to access a vetted pool of Filipino remote professionals. Workers join and apply for free.

## Who uses Replaceme?

- **Employers**: Small to medium businesses (SMBs), startups, and scale-ups looking to hire full-time or long-term remote Filipino staff at competitive rates without agency overhead.
- **Workers (Job Seekers)**: Filipino professionals seeking remote work with international employers across roles in tech, design, marketing, operations, customer support, and more.

## Core Value Propositions

- **Zero agency fees**: Employers pay a predictable flat subscription — no placement commissions, no salary percentages.
- **Workers receive 100% of their agreed salary**: The platform does not take a cut from worker earnings.
- **Direct relationships**: Employers and workers negotiate, communicate, and agree on terms directly inside the platform.
- **Built-in hiring pipeline**: Job posts, applicant tracking, messaging, and offer management in one dashboard.
- **Filipino talent pool**: Focus on the Philippines — English-proficient, globally competitive professionals with US-timezone availability.

## Subscription Tiers (Employers)

| Plan | Description |
|---|---|
| Discovery | Free tier for employers to post jobs and see anonymous applicant previews |
| Starter | Paid — unlocks full applicant profiles and resumes |
| Growth | Paid — includes direct messaging with candidates |
| Scale | Paid — full platform access for high-volume hiring teams |

## Public Pages

- Homepage: https://replaceme.ph/
- Job Board: https://replaceme.ph/jobs (browse active remote roles)
- Pricing: https://replaceme.ph/pricing
- Company Directory: https://replaceme.ph/companies
- Employer FAQs: https://replaceme.ph/faq/employer
- Worker FAQs: https://replaceme.ph/faq/worker
- Contact: https://replaceme.ph/contact
- Community: https://replaceme.ph/community
- Help Center: https://replaceme.ph/help

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- Platform type: Direct-hire SaaS marketplace
- Target geography: Philippines (talent supply), Global (employer demand)
- Pricing model: Employer subscription (4 tiers), free for workers
- No salary commission or placement fees
- Remote-first: All jobs are remote or remote-friendly
- Worker profiles are private — only visible to subscribed, verified employers
- Platform language: English

## Sitemap
